creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Cheng-Lung Sung, 20.12.08, 03:51h CET:

> Hi, Stefan.
> 
>     I have problems on testing these two p5-Thread-* ports.
>     Is there a convenient way to detect where perl is built with
>     thread support on port build phrase? (run-time?)

Sorry, I'm not a Perl expert and can't really answer your question,
either. Asking on perl@ or ports@ might help.

Regards,
Stefan
